entity.summary: Solana decentralized exchange preserved in current protocol registries, with continuing historical identity but insufficient recent public activity evidence for a full active classification.
entity.notes: Current protocol and DEX discovery data preserve Aldrin as a Solana exchange entity. Strong recent utilization and stable first-party application evidence were not recovered in this review pass. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead and leaves original URL fields unknown.

evidence.title: Aldrin DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: Current DEX discovery data identifies Aldrin as a Solana decentralized exchange.

evidence.title: Aldrin protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol profile preserves the Aldrin exchange identity while not by itself proving strong recent utilization.

evidence.title: Aldrin protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Protocol data supports a limited classification because the exchange identity remains preserved but strong recent trading evidence was not recovered.
